sample_questions: Describe a time you took initiative on a project
How do you plan to leverage Cornell's broader university?
What will you contribute to the Johnson community?
red_flags: Not understanding Johnson's tech and entrepreneurship focus
tips: Reference Johnson's immersion learning and cross-campus opportunities with Cornell Tech.
Show you understand and appreciate Ithaca's tight-knit community.
Johnson values 'hands-on learning' - have experiential examples ready.
